episodes.name: New History of Mankind
episodes.overview: Captain Strydum pays Baki a visit and gives him some shocking news; scientists have discovered a human preserved in a salt slab from the Jurassic era.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dd7sqsdn03jr/baki-hanma-s02e14-dying-for-love-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Completely Surrounded
episodes.overview: Soon after the prehistoric human arrives in Tokyo, the fiercest underground fighters in the country attempt to take him on.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/o2oj81qdemcb/baki-hanma-s02e15-feeling-the-beginning-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Nature Power VS Battle Power
episodes.overview: Pickle, who's used to devouring dinosaurs, struggles to find anything to eat in modern day Japan. Hoping to fight him, Retsu offers himself up as prey.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rqqeznxdtwwo/baki-hanma-s02e16-new-horizon-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Pickle's Tears
episodes.overview: After Retsu gives him a taste of highly evolved martial arts moves that have been passed on for thousands of years, Pickle suddenly begins to weep.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/9valzub4nvcn/baki-hanma-s02e17-legendary-promoter-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Just Want to See You
episodes.overview: On the streets of Shinjuku, Pickle tussles with the legendary street-fighter Kaoru Hanayama, a modern day human with the power of a Jurassic dinosaur.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vxyz4t7pscbi/baki-hanma-s02e18-turning-the-table-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Beyond the Sound Barrier
episodes.overview: Katsumi Orochi has never been able to gain the respect of his peers, but the time may have finally come for him to bring his skills to the next level.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/gju4ynqeyz89/baki-hanma-s02e19-god-of-boxing-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Moment of the Heat
episodes.overview: The moment comes when Pickle recognizes Katsumi as his prey; Katsumi responds by quickly unleashing his new and improved Mach Fist move.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/n9j57feyp6kn/baki-hanma-s02e20-their-own-way-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Praying Savage
episodes.overview: As riveted spectators look on, Katsumi Orochi sacrifices everything to his supersonic attacks, and yet Pickle continues to get back on his feet.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pjdirw9iadu4/baki-hanma-s02e21-father-son-dining-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Devouring Each Other
episodes.overview: It's a past-versus-present battle when Pickle, a powerful prehistoric human, fights a man who has ingested the most advanced performance enhancing drugs.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pb3us68ow58a/baki-hanma-s02e22-the-biggest-father-son-fight-in-history-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Food Reserve
episodes.overview: Baki enters Pickle’s enclosure and settles in; breathing the same air, eating the same flesh and living as the prehistoric man does.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cprj4srha2dw/baki-hanma-s02e23-urban-legend-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Weak Eats the Mighty
episodes.overview: The full effects of the 30 foot fall continue to crush Baki. Even Pickle looks disturbed by the sight of his opponent.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dzzk5qpc64ey/baki-hanma-s02e24-tears-swelling-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Final Form
episodes.overview: Baki goes on the offensive, visualizing three different dinosaurs at once as he clobbers Pickle, who responds with an unexpected move of his own.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/9pwwgtw67s95/baki-hanma-s02e25-son-father-and-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Unwritten Rule of the Fight
episodes.overview: Having recognized that the man he's now facing is stronger than any opponent he's ever faced, Pickle morphs into his true, all-powerful form.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2dfdw92rrufg/baki-hanma-s02e26-dress-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dying for Love
episodes.overview: Life returns to normal for Baki — but not for long. After bumping into his mother's old colleague, Baki recalls his parents' tumultuous relationship.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/eiyv7fdh6q21/baki-hanma-s02e27-taste-of-dad-1080p-nf-web-dl-ddp5-1-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E02: Hidden Inventory 2

episodes.name: S02 E03: Hidden Inventory 3

episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/m7lp52bo95c0/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e03-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E04: Hidden Inventory 4

episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/meloe1uuomi3/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e04-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ny9vd6mfgmol/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e05-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.overview: Team Mei Mei are reassigned to a veil that has been lowered over Meiji Shrine Station. The team splits up and Yuji encounters a grasshopper curse assigned to protecting the veil. Elsewhere Satoru Gojo encounters Jogo, Hanami, and Choso.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/5h0jgy8o9utj/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e08-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E09: Shibuya Incident - Gate, Open
episodes.overview: The battle between Satoru Gojo, Jogo, Hanami and Choso begins. Gojo informs Hanami that they will die first. Yuji encounters a woman who tells him that everyone was turned into monsters and boarded a train. As Gojo's battle continues, the train arrives.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/zdwswhwp3lol/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e09-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E10: Pandemonium
episodes.overview: Now that Satoru Gojo has been sealed, Mechamaru works with Team Mei Mei to inform them about what is going on and has them work on enacting his plan on what to do now.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/9xsx92xw76fj/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e10-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E11: Seance
episodes.overview: Nanami, Fushiguro, and Ino meet up with Itadori, then Nanami issues new orders for the others to work together to lift the veil keeping sorcerers out.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/i25krw895fmf/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e11-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E12: Dull Knife
episodes.overview: Yuji and Megumi lift the veil that was keeping sorcerers from entering Shibuya. Nobara and Nitta encounter Shigemo and a battle ensues. Shigemo has the upperhand, but then Nanami arrives with the deaths of the assistant supervisors in mind.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dpj4oon96dwl/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e12-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E13: Red Scale
episodes.overview: Yuji makes his way to Shibuya Station where he's confronted by Choso. Choso unleashes his Convergence and the battle between him and Yuji commences.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/b2splzfdttb6/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e13-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E14: Fluctuations
episodes.overview: Mei Mei and Ui Ui fight the Special-Grade Disease Curse summoned by whatever is pretending to be Suguru Geto. Meanwhile, Nanami joins up with Maki and Naobito, but they encounter a cursed spirit with unknown powers.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/sj4qe06r135g/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e14-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E15: Fluctuations (2)
episodes.overview: Nanami, Maki, and Naobito are driven to the edge after the Special-Grade Cursed Spirit, Dagon, activates his Domain Expansion, Horizon of the Captivating Skandha. Fushiguro gives them a glimpse of a way to escape death, then Toji intrudes upon the fight.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rx7fk2hgww8p/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e15-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E16: Thunderclap
episodes.overview: Sukuna refuses to heed Jogo's advice after waking up, instead displaying his overwhelming strength against the Special-Grade Cursed Spirit, Jogo. Meanwhile, Fushiguro faces off against the rampant Toji with neither being aware of the other's identity.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/n6zmwip0c8j2/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e16-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E17: Thunderclap (2)
episodes.overview: After being severely injured in his fight against Toji, Fushiguro suffers a surprise attack from Shigemo. On the verge of death, Fushiguro desperately heads toward Dougenzaka crossing and summons a certain Shikigami with his Ten Shadows Technique.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cs7uyge3ieg7/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e17-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E18: Right and Wrong
episodes.overview: Itadori reawakens with grievous resolve as he bears witness to the aftermath Sukuna has wrought upon Shibuya. Meanwhile, Nanami continues to fight through packs of transfigured humans in an exhausted haze until Mahito appears before him.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ns2fro7o2xsz/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e18-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E19: Right and Wrong (2)
episodes.overview: Itadori launches into a back-and-forth battle against Mahito, but he struggles against Mahito's ploy of using average people against him. Meanwhile, Kugisaki encounters one of Mahito's separated bodies as she returns to the battlefield.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/purrttf9trab/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e19-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E20: Right and Wrong (3)
episodes.overview: Itadori stands in a daze at the disaster before his eyes, his mind already well past its limit. As a curse, Mahito is elated at seeing his ideal sequence of events play out before him, and he prepares to further finish off Itadori.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/sf2qxpeq2m5c/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e20-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E21: Metamorphosis
episodes.overview: After rescuing Itadori from his predicament, Todo bolsters his morale and encourages him to stand back up. As Mahito kicks things into higher gear, he begins using Soul Multiplicity and Body Repel to unleash omnidirectional attacks.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/mcypalplci2h/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e21-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E22: Metamorphosis (2)
episodes.overview: The moment it appeared Itadori and Mahito's battle to the death was resolved, the being wearing Geto's body asked, "Shall I save you, Mahito?" Itadori immediately recognizes the man before him as the very same one who sealed away Gojo and leaps to attack.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/67yiry84qdwd/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e22-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S02 E23: Shibuya Incident - Gate, Close
episodes.overview: Choso begins to realize the identity of the mastermind parasitizing Geto's corpse as sorcerers gather for the final moments of the Shibuya Incident. The special-grade sorcerer, Yuki Tsukumo, comes to the rescue when they're on the verge of death.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6tazmv1gv509/jujutsu-kaisen-s02e23-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-to" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S03 E01: Execution
episodes.overview: While Yuji grapples with the weight of his sins, Naoya Zen'in and Yuta Okkotsu set out to execute him.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fuhre2z248p9/jujutsu-kaisen-s03e01-720p-web-dl-multi-audio-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S03 E02: One More Time
episodes.overview: After fighting Yuta, Yuji learns his real objective. Megumi asks for Yuji's help to save his sister.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/0clj9psaqgxa/jujutsu-kaisen-s03e02-720p-web-dl-multi-audio-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S03 E03: About the Culling Game
episodes.overview: Itadori and his friends speak with Tengen about Kenjaku's objectives and their plans for the Culling Game.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/43okg0c51st1/jujutsu-kaisen-s03e03-720p-web-dl-multi-audio-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S03 E04: Perfect Preparation
episodes.overview: After going to collect their Cursed Tools, Maki awakens her true potential & slaughters the whole Zen'in Clan.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/j5gq3t9oc9bl/jujutsu-kaisen-s03e04-720p-web-dl-multi-audio-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: S03 E05: Passion
episodes.overview: Yaga is executed. Yuji and Fushiguro go to Hakari's fight club hoping to meet him and recruit him.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/8j5pngtdhakb/jujutsu-kaisen-s03e05-720p-web-dl-multi-audio-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: RYUSUI VS. SENKU
episodes.overview: Senku and his companions finally set off for America in search of corn. However, a dispute arises between Ryusui and Senku shortly after they depart.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/7lkr0qxpx9u6/dr-stone-s04e01-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: SCIENCE JOURNEY
episodes.overview: Maintaining morale will be critical on the long journey to the Americas. Knowing where on the ocean you are is pretty important, too. The crew of the Perseus discuss.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/3t2tkx3282d1/dr-stone-s04e02-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Light Trap in the Darkness
episodes.overview: The Perseus lands in the Americas. They first head to Northern California in search of yellow dent corn, but discover a lot more than that.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/geh6qsb5upjm/dr-stone-s04e03-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dr. X
episodes.overview: The search party narrowly escaped enemy machine gun fire. Unfortunately, the respite was short-lived.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/lyqb0mkcbnbd/dr-stone-s04e04-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: DOCTOR VS. DOCTOR
episodes.overview: Tensions rise as Dr. Xeno makes his introductions to the Perseus.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ln18qmjkdnt2/dr-stone-s04e05-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: SCIENCE IS ELEGANT
episodes.overview: Stanley orders Luna to infiltrate the Perseus and identify Doctor Taiju. Things go sideways when it turns out to be a little too easy.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hjod931ckaz3/dr-stone-s04e06-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Two Scientists
episodes.overview: Senku had gotten his start in rocket building through an email exchange with Doctor Xeno. Their approaches to science soon diverged.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dhm8q4vopa5p/dr-stone-s04e07-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: LOCK ON
episodes.overview: NASA scientist Dr. Xeno attempts to pick off the leader of the Kingdom of Science.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/4cdrt43311h2/dr-stone-s04e08-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Light of Science
episodes.overview: With Senku having been shot, the Kingdom of Science plots its retaliation against Dr. Xeno.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/tdgcim2o7s5j/dr-stone-s04e09-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dirty Roads
episodes.overview: With Senku still confined to the bed, Chrome's team begins work on the tunnel to Xeno's base.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/dib6i7mi6pzc/dr-stone-s04e10-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Those Who Know the Rules; Those Who Make Them
episodes.overview: Ryusui and Senku take to the skies in a science versus science dogfight while Xeno's forces mount a ground counterattack.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vaqwt609egxd/dr-stone-s04e11-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Reunion
episodes.overview: Xeno's army attacks and when all seems lost, Chrome and his friends finish the tunnel and capture Xeno.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/adq9a5p2yl6h/dr-stone-s04e12-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Watching the Same Moon
episodes.overview: The team head to the source of the petrification beam in South America as they flee from Stanley's ship.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/j5ppjz8ewrw8/dr-stone-s04e13-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: EARTH RACE
episodes.overview: Senku and company must flee from Stanley's ship, but they have to make stops to refuel.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/30f4ap4y49e1/dr-stone-s04e14-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Escape
episodes.overview: With Stanley's ship hot on their tail, can science help Senku and company escape?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/njsw03mqiioh/dr-stone-s04e15-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Medusa Mechanism
episodes.overview: The team is going to need a weapon for when Stanley inevitably catches up to them.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/noiftxq4t1sj/dr-stone-s04e16-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Sickening Yet Beautiful
episodes.overview: Senku and his team have lost Stanley for now, but they aren't out of — or rather, in — the woods just yet.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/i5v0gx0m723y/dr-stone-s04e17-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Diamond Heart
episodes.overview: The team discovers a giant pile of petrification devices. They take them apart to see what makes them tick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/3e3h8zfcfu0g/dr-stone-s04e18-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Stone Sanctuary
episodes.overview: The team begins making, digging for, and polishing diamonds to replace the burnt-out ones inside the devices.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vhuoa4qgmxch/dr-stone-s04e19-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: What I Once Sought to Destroy
episodes.overview: Suika is in charge of making sure Senku's plan works, but her kindness becomes an obstacle.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ho4ei09n1f04/dr-stone-s04e20-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Our Dr. Stone
episodes.overview: With the revival team captured, it's up to Luna and Chelsea to revive everyone when the time comes.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/af4iu2yg7igi/dr-stone-s04e21-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Until We Meet Again
episodes.overview: With the petrification beam approaching, who will get their hands on the revival fluid?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/34in2iaskqjl/dr-stone-s04e22-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Scientist, All Alone
episodes.overview: Suika gathers the team's statues, sets up camp and gets to work doing science.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/7z2gb7o2o8d8/dr-stone-s04e23-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Whole New World
episodes.overview: Suika attempts to create a revival liquid from scratch. Feeling lonely and anxious, she repeatedly fails, but finally manages to revive Senku!! As she revives her friends from the Kingdom of Science one by one and reunites with them for the first time in seven years, Senku discovers a terrifying secret hidden in the petrification device... And the moon landing plan to uncover Whyman's true identity is restarted, involving the entire world!!

items.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Treasure Island
items.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/of5xmm54j7gb/doraemon-nobitas-treasure-island-2018-bluray-dual-audio" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Asta and Yuno
episodes.overview: In this world, everyone can use magic… and in a land called the Clover Kingdom, two young men, Asta and Yuno, strive to become the Wizard King, the greatest of all magic users. Asta and Yuno were abandoned together at a church in Hage, a village in the boonies, and lived as brothers from that day onward. For some reason, however, Asta never developed the ability to use magic, even when Yuno had already mastered wind magic. Now, at last, the boys are turning fifteen, the age at which children receive their own grimoires. Asta has high hopes that receiving his grimoire will awaken his latent ability to use magic, but when the time comes…
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/azne6f8vaxgi/black-clover-s01e01-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Young Man's Vow
episodes.overview: The grimoire that Yuno received was a legendary grimoire with a four-leaf clover. A bandit named Revchi comes to steal it, and Asta comes to Yuno’s rescue.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pa9fpou8ct41/black-clover-s01e02-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: To the Royal Capital!
episodes.overview: Asta and Yuno spend six months training for the upcoming Magic Knights Entrance Exam. Everyone seems to think Yuno is sure to pass, but worries that Asta is just wasting his time.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yimp5c509by9/black-clover-s01e03-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Magic Knights Entrance Exam
episodes.overview: Asta and Yuno head toward the colosseum in the royal capital for the Magic Knights Entrance Exam, while looking around and admiring all the things they’ve never seen before.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/zbkod2m44e5x/black-clover-s01e04-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Road to the Wizard King
episodes.overview: The entrance exam finally comes to a close. The time has arrives for the captains to decide which candidates they want to join their squads.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/kd1ao1vgrn09/black-clover-s01e05-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Black Bulls
episodes.overview: Asta has arrived at the home of the Black Bulls, which Yami himself called the absolute worst Magic Knights Squad. He is greeted by the squad’s unique members.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/povu4p9h22sp/black-clover-s01e06-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Another New Member
episodes.overview: As a new member of the Black Bulls, Asta is thrilled to receive his very first private room, even though it’s tiny. Everything Asta sees as Magna shows him around the squad’s base is new and exciting to him.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/id0zrx3079q4/black-clover-s01e07-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Go! Go! My First Mission
episodes.overview: The Magic Knights: heroes that everyone in the kingdom looks up to and dreams of becoming one day. But the new recruit, Asta, has yet to do anything that seems like what a Magic Knight should be doing, as he’s stuck doing random chores.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/bg2btq4uynk4/black-clover-s01e08-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Beasts
episodes.overview: On Yami’s orders, Asta and Noelle go on their first mission with Magna to hunt wild boars. They successfully complete the mission and go to Saussy Village to meet with the mayor, Seyhe.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/zdemzw3icx4k/black-clover-s01e09-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Guardians
episodes.overview: Asta, Noelle, and Magna are doing their best to protect the villagers of Rayaka from the ice magic user Heath and his underlings, but Asta’s attacks don’t seem to be working, and Magna’s magical powers are running low.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/m1jb5ljfvdmk/black-clover-s01e10-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: What Happened One Day in the Castle Town
episodes.overview: It’s payday! Vanessa takes Asta and Noelle to the castle town of Kikka for a little shopping, where they encounter many familiar faces along the way.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/af6707ismxzj/black-clover-s01e11-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Wizard King Saw
episodes.overview: All eyes are on Asta as he and Sekke race to capture a purse-snatcher. Meanwhile, Yuno’s first Golden Dawn mission takes him to an unexpected place.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/kda34na8icce/black-clover-s01e12-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Wizard King Saw, Continued
episodes.overview: Yuno never expected his last-minute detour to involve such tragedy. It’s up to the Golden Dawn to get the bottom of their mission’s many mysteries.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/nhmmh7jc7eq0/black-clover-s01e13-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dungeon
episodes.overview: Asta and Noelle are charged with exploring a newly discovered dungeon full of magical traps. Their leader, the battle-mad Luck, is less than helpful.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/icrmu4tr1bwy/black-clover-s01e14-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Diamond Mage
episodes.overview: Suddenly the dungeon is host to several teams racing through traps to the treasure waiting in its depth—including a noted mage from an enemy nation.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/uqfcjd6d9pwj/black-clover-s01e15-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Friends
episodes.overview: Asta, Yuno, and their squadmates must take on daunting foes on their way to the heart of the dungeon, but Luck remains dead set on fighting all alone.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/xh6v117t46vz/black-clover-s01e16-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Destroyer
episodes.overview: The Diamond Kingdom’s secret weapon wields more powerful magic than anyone has seen. The Golden Dawn team is all but decimated. Can he be defeated?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/k6dd6ya0ohbh/black-clover-s01e17-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Memories of You
episodes.overview: The Clover Kingdom’s Magic Knights reach the dungeon’s treasure hall, but another daunting battle keeps them from reveling in their victory for long.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/anlyh92s9db7/black-clover-s01e18-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Destruction and Salvation
episodes.overview: The dungeon itself turns against the Magic Knights as they fight to escape—and to keep a badly wounded Asta alive. Mars remembers how he came to be.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fw802d0qckd1/black-clover-s01e19-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Assembly at the Royal Capital
episodes.overview: Asta and Noelle visits the royal capital to report on the dungeon mission, but get roped into something else entirely with their Golden Dawn friends.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6e9i6nyw83zw/black-clover-s01e20-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Capital Riot
episodes.overview: The royal capital is under siege! The Magic Knight squads must set aside their quarrels and come together to defend the Clover Kingdom and its people.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fk4308jv0jf8/black-clover-s01e21-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Wild Magic Dance
episodes.overview: The best of the Magic Knights—plus Asta and Noelle—fight the hordes of undead beseiging the royal capital. Noelle suffers a crisis of confidence.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/n8v4124f2hk2/black-clover-s01e22-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The King of the Crimson Lions
episodes.overview: Asta’s showdown with the man behind the capital invasion takes a turn. King Clover bemoans the Wizard King’s absence in his kingdom’s time of need.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/z72iza3pduva/black-clover-s01e23-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Blackout
episodes.overview: Rades wasn’t the only invader—and the others are more powerful, their sights set far higher. The Magic Knights fall victim to a Spatial Magic spell.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/angbe5uegrtn/black-clover-s01e24-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Adversity
episodes.overview: What has become of Fuegoleon Vermillion? Yuno struggles to recover from his battle with the witch, while Asta’s cursed wounds threaten to do him in.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/kctwo6fqegln/black-clover-s01e25-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Wounded Beasts
episodes.overview: The masterminds behind the invasion reveal themselves, though their motivation remains unclear. Asta spends quality time with one of his heroes.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/iojssm7s13k6/black-clover-s01e26-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Light
episodes.overview: As life slowly returns to normal in the royal capital, the Wizard King reaches an uncomfortable conclusion about the invasion and how it came about.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/r7668v4wyb9p/black-clover-s01e27-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The One I’ve Set My Heart On
episodes.overview: Finral invites two of his squadmates to a mixer, but they aren’t the only Magic Knights who show up. Asta gets closer to a certain young woman.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/99pv9w7njkw7/black-clover-s01e28-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Path
episodes.overview: Old friends and fellow squad members reminisce about Asta: his humble beginnings, his craziest battles—and underlying it all, his burning ambition.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/aoo4ohnpjixw/black-clover-s01e29-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Mirror Mage
episodes.overview: The Black Bulls get a day off, which Gauche spends visiting his beloved sister Marie. Then a mysterious tragedy befalls the village—is Marie safe?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ilqeg67feuqy/black-clover-s01e30-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Pursuit Over the Snow
episodes.overview: Asta and Gauche scour the countryside in search of Nean’s children, who have fallen into the clutches of a ruthless monster thirsty for their magic.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/mbwfhtyftw2p/black-clover-s01e31-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Three-Leaf Sprouts
episodes.overview: As expected, there were bigger baddies behind the abduction of Nean’s children. Luckily Sister Theresa is on hand to join the fight for their freedom.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/3ra8eoe46iyt/black-clover-s01e32-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: To Help Somebody, Someday
episodes.overview: Gauche reflects on his past as he struggles with protecting Marie versus helping Asta in his downhill battle against Sally’s mutant magic monster.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fflozkb5m4k7/black-clover-s01e33-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Light Magic vs. Dark Magic
episodes.overview: Backup arrives for Asta’s showdown against the leader of the Eye of the Midnight Sun. Asta must push past his limits to pull off a tricky technique.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/24efj3aax7ww/black-clover-s01e34-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Light of Judgment
episodes.overview: The Black Bulls seem to be on the losing end of an epic clash between two highly gifted magic users. Gauche has an idea that could turn the tables.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rdno6qip0741/black-clover-s01e35-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Three Eyes
episodes.overview: Three elite members of the Eye of the Midnight Sun pay a visit to their comrade Licht, prepared to make Yami and friends pay for what they’ve done.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jq3r7p4f3djr/black-clover-s01e36-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The One with No Magic
episodes.overview: The Third Eye battle rages on, now with three talented Magic Knight captains providing backup. Licht reveals an intriguing tidbit about Asta’s gear.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ituqe9ohb79k/black-clover-s01e37-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Magic Knight Captains Conference
episodes.overview: The Wizard King calls a meeting of the Magic Knight captains. Asta has barely enough time to recuperate before being summoned to the royal capital.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/55bjdq836k4u/black-clover-s01e38-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Three-Leaf Salute
episodes.overview: There’s a traitor among the captains! Marx’s spell reveals who’s been collaborating with the Eye of the Midnight Sun. Julius considers his next move.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ch5g4ssff71y/black-clover-s01e39-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Black Beach Story
episodes.overview: The Black Bulls relax at the beach as they gear up for their secret mission. Noelle’s showing off new swimsuit—if Asta would pay any attention.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/9eujg41n8yte/black-clover-s01e40-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Water Girl Grows Up
episodes.overview: Noelle’s magic is indispensable for the fight ahead. A new friend has some tips to help improve her magic control, but Noelle has a long way to go.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/mm2si1z96ufe/black-clover-s01e41-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Underwater Temple
episodes.overview: The eccentric high priest of the Underwater Temple makes it crystal clear that the Black Bulls won’t get their hands on the magic stone that easily.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/513f00kqxxoz/black-clover-s01e42-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Temple Battle Royale
episodes.overview: It’s the misfit magicians of the Black Bulls up against the fearsome fish-masked Temple Mages. Noelle faces a surprising foe, and Asta uses his head.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/t4x119vb7x0a/black-clover-s01e43-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Pointlessly Direct Fireball and the Wild Lightning
episodes.overview: A dangerous interloper has muscled his way into the Underwater Temple fight, and it’s up to Yami’s crew to deal with him and his mind-boggling might.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/3sabnzuz5082/black-clover-s01e44-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Guy Who Doesn’t Know When to Quit
episodes.overview: While Asta has his hands more than full with Vetto, Gauche must think outside the box as he takes on some of the beastly mage’s talented minions.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/lcpt5mj4x8rk/black-clover-s01e45-720p-hin-eng-jap-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Awakening

episodes.name: End and Beginning
episodes.overview: Momonga is a regular salaryman who leads a guild in an DMMO-RPG known as Yggdrasil. After twelve years of playing the game, the servers are finally shutting down. Momonga logs in for the last time, seeing the game to its end. However, after the clock strikes midnight, nothing changes.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/5pfnk21emp4w/overlord-s01e01-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Floor Guardians
episodes.overview: Grateful that they weren’t cast aside, the floor guardians experience the rule of their true master for the first time. Momonga quickly assess the situation and works toward protecting the tomb from invaders while contemplating what he must do.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/wdgkpp7cc6r3/overlord-s01e02-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Battle of Carne Village
episodes.overview: Momonga continues his efforts to protect Nazarick from the unknown forces he may be up against in this world. As he manipulates the Mirror of Remote Viewing, he notices a village being attacked and decides to test his strength against humans.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rgkvzz4nd26a/overlord-s01e03-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Ruler of Death
episodes.overview: Momonga finds that the attackers of Carne Village were Slane Theocracy soldiers dressed as people from the Baharuth Empire. As the attack to lure and eliminate Gazef Stronoff continues, Momonga takes this chance to continue his tests…
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2yfbyslgu9nk/overlord-s01e04-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Two Adventurers
episodes.overview: Momonga sets out with Narberal disguised as humans under the names of Momon and Nabe for the city of E-Rantel. There they register to become adventurers in order to gain more information about this unknown world. As they do, evil gathers around them.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/uiih1b5vo707/overlord-s01e05-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Journey
episodes.overview: While Momonga has some doubts, he accepts Nphirea Balear’s request under the condition that the members of the Swords of Darkness join them. Though her urge to kill keeps distracting her, Clementine continues to slowly find her way to Nphirea.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/g7gbohqppcsi/overlord-s01e06-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Wise King of Forest
episodes.overview: Momonga and his group continue to Carne Village. There they see that the villagers are working toward fortifying their defenses against possible future enemies. Nphirea meets up with Enri and asks her about this man named Ains Ooal Gown.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/nsoc0o9xjmbe/overlord-s01e07-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Twin Swords of Slashing Death
episodes.overview: After Momonga registers Hamusuke with the guild, he goes to Nphirea’s home to find that his client has been kidnapped. The zombified remains of the Swords of Darkness litter the storage room. And there, Momonga finds the tortured body of Ninya.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/xwxh97n2twg9/overlord-s01e08-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Dark Warrior
episodes.overview: Momonga and Narberal begin their respective battles against Clementine and Khajit. Momonga takes this chance to learn about the mechanics of fighting in this world, but in the end, he must show Clementine the consequences of offending him.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/w3nmu20dcmru/overlord-s01e09-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: True Vampire
episodes.overview: Momonga finds out that Shalltear has revolted against him, due to something that had happened while she was on her mission with Sebas and Solution. The story rewinds a bit and goes over that very event. What could possibly change her loyalty to him?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fgo8kath0e65/overlord-s01e10-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Confusion and Understanding
episodes.overview: Momonga does damage control at the guild while he assesses the reason for Shalltear’s revolt. Coming to the conclusion that she is under an incurable status effect, Momonga goes to the treasury to retrieve some of the powerful weapons of Nazarick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yfl3p96e22jc/overlord-s01e11-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Bloody Valkyrie
episodes.overview: Though Shalltear’s skill set puts Momonga at a complete disadvantage, he steps forward into battle. He gave various world items to his guardians to ensure the safety of Nazarick in his absence. Now, all that is left is a battle of life and death!
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/84jqe3blh6cv/overlord-s01e12-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Player VS Non Player Character
episodes.overview: Momonga reminds Shalltear that he is the master of Nazarick and that his name carries the weight of all the supreme beings of Ains Ooal Gown. After the battle comes to a close, Momonga quickly takes action to strengthen the defenses of Nazarick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/maia3j8qwflu/overlord-s01e13-720p-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Dawn of Despair
episodes.overview: Officers of the Slane Theocracy gather to discuss recent losses. The noblemen of Estize plot to push back the Empire. Ains surveys a world map as his plans are set in motion. Shalltear recovers from her ordeal.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/tfjfm6uh0ada/overlord-s02e01-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Departure
episodes.overview: Cocytus gives a declaration of war to all the tribes of the Lizardmen, expecting an easy takeover. However, the Lizardmen decide to try to unite their tribes against their common foe.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/7ru85e3wj1sw/overlord-s02e02-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Lizard Men, Gathering
episodes.overview: Zenberu tests Zaryusu’s strength in combat, while the latter defends Crusch’s honor. The Lizardmen chiefs conduct a war council, and formulate a strategy to defend themselves against their common enemy.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6x4llrdbsdnz/overlord-s02e03-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Army of Death
episodes.overview: The alliance of the Lizard men win the battle and defeat the army of undead. The defeat guardian Cocytus and the new ability to learn from their mistakes, prove that the guardians can adapt to new situations. Ainz Ooal Gown therefore changes his tactics, ordering Cocytus to bring the Lizard men to their knees and under the rule of the Great Tomb of Nazarick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/0ludsi42rgra/overlord-s02e04-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Freezing God
episodes.overview: At the outpost in the Tob Forest, Ains strategizes with his guardians, and imposes Shalltear’s penance upon her. The Lizard Man chiefs assemble and receive Cocytus on the battlefield for their final showdown.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/t05spkmq7onw/overlord-s02e05-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Those Who Pick Up, Those Who Are Picked Up
episodes.overview: Sebas happens upon a near-lifeless woman, and takes her under his protection. Brain, left defeated by his encounter with Shalltear, meets up with Gazef. Members of the Blue Rose take measures against a drug plantation
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vhhs4teilsrg/overlord-s02e06-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Blue Roses
episodes.overview: Gazef finds Climb practicing with his sword outside the castle, and asks to spar with him. Renner and Lakyus examine the coded document recovered by Evileye. Sebas finds himself beset upon from all sides over Tuare.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pethi2z9ib4t/overlord-s02e07-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Boy’s Feeling
episodes.overview: Climb delivers Lakyus’ message to Evileye and Gagaran, who offer guidance to the young man. Climb happens upon some men beating up a boy in the street, who is then rescued by Sebas, from whom he seeks training.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/i77fijdfx7df/overlord-s02e08-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Soaring Sparks of Fire
episodes.overview: Sebas begins his raid of the brothel from one side, while Climb and Brain enter from the other side. While Climb covers the exit alone, he is confronted by Succulent and Cocco Doll trying to flee and a desperate fight begins.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/l7zcf96nbu4d/overlord-s02e09-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Disturbance Begins in the Royal Capital
episodes.overview: Ains calls on Sebas to answer for his actions, and to discuss what is to become of Tuare. Renner meets with the Blue Rose, then Marquis Raeven, to consult with them about her planned attacks against Eight Fingers.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jpbnt567fb31/overlord-s02e10-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Jaldabaoth
episodes.overview: Demiurge takes charge of Nazarick’s forces, laying out the mission to strike at Eight Fingers. Meanwhile, Lakyus details a similar mission to her squad captains. Sebas, Climb, and Brain raid Six Arms’ compound together.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/zhh2yu0zhf8q/overlord-s02e11-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Final Battle of the Disturbance
episodes.overview: Evileye petitions Momon to help her, and he begins fighting the disguised Demiurge. As Climb and the others try to get Tuare out of the compound, they face resistance. Renner convenes an emergency strategy meeting.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1lggzc38724u/overlord-s02e12-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Ultimate Trump Card
episodes.overview: The guardsmen and adventurers face a daunting array of demons until Momon arrives and takes charge. Brain once again comes face to face with Shalltear. While Evileye is occupied, Demiurge reveals his plan to Ains.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/q2a10cew6cmx/overlord-s02e13-720p-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Ruler’s Melancholy
episodes.overview: With the events of Re-Estize Kingdom and the Lizard Men behind them, the loyal servants of Nazarick return to their daily routines. Ains, however, is worried about the work/life balance of his NPCs. They work day in and day out without rest…
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6b72qku361by/overlord-iii-s03e01-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Carne Village Once More
episodes.overview: As Nazarick decides on their next steps, the village of Carne focuses on rebuilding their homes. Enri and her goblin troop are busy protecting the villagers, training the vigilante troop, and manning the fields. All the while, unrest builds in the forest.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1zphcvub17v5/overlord-iii-s03e02-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Enri’s Upheaval and Hectic Days
episodes.overview: Enri meets Agu, who tells everyone that the Giant of the East and Demon Snake of the West are gathering forces to fight the master of the Monument of Ruin. Enri and the others take action, but little does she know how crazy the day will become…
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/0ow7d5e4da3j/overlord-iii-s03e03-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Giant of the East, Demon Snake of the West
episodes.overview: Ains decides to go and see the Giant of the East and Demon Snake of the West himself. If they are similar to Hamusuke, they may have some worth as experimental subjects. They may also be useful in testing Lupisregina’s capabilities with the village.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/iynja9s7bmpb/overlord-iii-s03e04-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Two Leaders
episodes.overview: The "Giant of the East" has come to attack Carne Village, but the villagers are willing to put their lives on the line to protect their home and families. While the goblin troop defends the front gates, Enri and Nphirea defends the village from behind.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/r9pf0yjojx52/overlord-iii-s03e05-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Invitation to Death
episodes.overview: The Tomb of Nazarick continues their plan for world domination and Ains visits the Baharuth Empire as Momon of Darkness. Meanwhile, Count Femel hires a large number of Workers to explore a certain tomb recently discovered in Re-Estize Kingdom.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/44y5neq794fz/overlord-iii-s03e06-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Butterfly Entangled in a Spider’s Web
episodes.overview: The foolish workers that have entered the Tomb of Nazarick greatly anger Ains Ooal Gown. Albedo and the others have already finished preparations for their welcome and Lord Ains watches on, determined that not a single one leaves his tomb alive.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ln5lmt6kxkz1/overlord-iii-s03e07-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: A Handful of Hope
episodes.overview: The worker group Foresight is teleported to the fighting arena in the sixth floor to challenge the great Ains Ooal Gown. Ains tries to restrain his smoldering fury as he disposes the last of the filthy thieves that dare trample into his treasured Nazarick.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/xn65pv053lwa/overlord-iii-s03e08-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: War of Words
episodes.overview: Ainz sends Aura and Mare to the Empire with a message. Come and apologize or watch as your country burn to the ground. With no other option, Emperor Jircniv heads toward Nazarick with the head of a noble in tow. Though, things are not as they seem.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2xcb9u5a1jjz/overlord-iii-s03e09-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Preparation for War
episodes.overview: Re-Estize Kingdom prepares for war after receiving a declaration from the Empire that they will claim the land near E-Rantel for the Sorcerer King Gown. Gazef knows the magic caster’s strength, but he cannot stop what has already been set into motion.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ff8gigyhyo99/overlord-iii-s03e10-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Another Battle
episodes.overview: Carne Village is in a pinch once again. An army led by the first prince of Re-Estize has appeared, demanding to be let in so the villagers can be questioned about Ains Ooal Gown. Enri must make a decision for the village and its people.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cf0ze98030p8/overlord-iii-s03e11-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Massacre
episodes.overview: The war is finally starting. The Empire plans to use this chance to see the depths of the Sorcerer King’s strength and the Kingdom is confident that they have fully prepared themselves for this war. Gazef stands ready. Now, let the despair begin.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/z4eofgbrwy0w/overlord-iii-s03e12-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Player vs Player
episodes.overview: Gazef challenges Ains to a duel that is impossible to win and Ains decides to accept. The battle will soon come to an end and the fate of E-Rantel will be decided. Even amongst the bloodshed, Gazef and Ains both hold the other in deep respect.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ccqzurooei78/overlord-iii-s03e13-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-esub-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Ains Ooal Gown Nation of Leading Darkness
episodes.overview: As Ains muddles his way through ruling his new kingdom, he continues to ponder over a particularly important question. Everyone in his kingdom and the Tomb of Nazarick is also waiting for his answer. What kind of kingdom does he wish to create?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/hpyqr0sdbvot/overlord-iv-s04e01-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Re-Estize Kingdom
episodes.overview: Albedo personally makes her way to Re-Estize Kingdom as an envoy of the Sorcerer Kingdom. Meanwhile, the people of Re-Estize continue to do what they can to recover from the recent war and prepare for the future. Though not everyone has peace in mind.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/bjagx258lmas/overlord-iv-s04e02-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Baharuth Empire
episodes.overview: The major powers in other countries grow increasingly wary about the Sorcerer Kingdom. Especially the emperor of the Barahuth Empire, who might go bald from the stress induced by the overwhelming power of Ains Ooal Gown. On which side will he stand?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/u738zu4e6z3m/overlord-iv-s04e03-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Ruler of Conspiracy
episodes.overview: While Albedo and the others make their moves toward world domination, Ains has his own little plan. He wants to cultivate true adventurers to explore the unknown, like the players in Yggdrasil. His recruitment efforts bring him to the Baharuth Empire...
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/70vmdho4ec01/overlord-iv-s04e04-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: In Pursuit of the Land of Dwarves
episodes.overview: After his visit to the Empire, Ains decides to go and create a friendly relationship with the Dwarf Kingdom. Sadly, he only finds an empty city when he gets there. Deep within the tunnels, he meets a dwarf named Gondo who tells him happened.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yunxbtgxx6hn/overlord-iv-s04e05-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Impending Crisis
episodes.overview: Ains decides to lend a hand to the dwarves fighting against the Quagoa, but not for free. He wants to gather Gondo and the other runesmiths for the Sorcerer Kingdom. At the same time, Ains happens to find the perfect chance to teach Shalltear a thing or two.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/zo8q2ingof4u/overlord-iv-s04e06-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Frost Dragon Lord
episodes.overview: The Clan Lord discovers that Ains and his group are approaching the royal capital and asks the frost dragons for help. The Dragon Lord sends his son to intercept the party, while Ains decides to split up the group to confront the Quagoa and frost dragons.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/357n3onwig2u/overlord-iv-s04e07-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: An Unexpected Move
episodes.overview: While various things are happening in the neighboring countries, Philip continues to wallow in failure within the Re-Estize Kingdom. After meeting with some nobles from his new faction and he suddenly comes up with a brilliant idea...
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6xhaexvw9xjv/overlord-iv-s04e08-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Countdown to Extinction
episodes.overview: The Sorcerer Kingdom declares war against the Re-Estize Kingdom and gives them exactly one month to prepare. Ains plans to show the world what happens to the enemies of Ains Ooal Gown. However, a few in Nazarick consider this massacre excessive.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/p2qcbd8ujbd2/overlord-iv-s04e09-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Last King
episodes.overview: Ains and his army marches towards the royal capital to finally annihilate the Re-Estize Kingdom. Various forces prepare themselves for the coming onslaught. Before the last battle, Zanac rides alone to meet with Ains for a peaceful discussion.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/bvyqgtcn1vtr/overlord-iv-s04e10-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Well-prepared Traps
episodes.overview: To gain more information, Ains and Albedo use themselves as bait as they approach the royal capital. Azuth comes to defend the capital and quickly separates the two. While the two of them exchange blows in the air, a mysterious figure comes to visit Ains
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/g7lojkbnwv6i/overlord-iv-s04e11-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Invasion of the Royal Capital
episodes.overview: Everyone in the Re-Estize Kingdom makes their final preparations as the Sorcerer Kingdom's army invades the royal capital. Some try to escape and some just wait to die. But there are a few among them who wish to fight until the very end.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cd28z826pcvs/overlord-iv-s04e12-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Witch of the Falling Kingdom
episodes.overview: Princess Renner decides to stay with her father and struggle against the Sorcerer King until the very end. Climb follows the orders of the princess and sneaks out of the royal palace only to be surprised at what he greets him when he returns.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/2531eavaer0y/overlord-iv-s04e13-720p-web-dl-hin-jap-x265-daniewatch" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

items.title: Ghost in the Shell: Arise - Border 5: Pyrophoric Cult
Ghost in the Shell: The New Movie
